title: Reawakened
description: Reawakened adds a new weapon loot drop from Vindicators and a new item
body:
Reawakened is a mod adding a new weapon and a item

the weapon is called Reaping scythe dropped by vindicators, its like a netherite axe in attack damage and attack speed, but with sweeping.

the item is The Dark Resonance Scroll, letting you when standing in a woodland mansion, respawn the original vindicators and evokers. (this item is uncraftable and currently just there to reset the mansions for servers with set worldborders)
